title: pyrus pyraster var. tomentosa
intro: Pyrus pyraster var. tomentosa, also known as the downy wild pear, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Europe and Western Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Pyrus pyraster var. tomentosa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to soothe respiratory and digestive issues, as well as to promote overall well-being.
